mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TF_TASK_PK.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO TF_TASK( ID, PROJECT_ID, NAME, DESCRIPTION, STATUS, PRIORITY, START_DATE, DUE_DATE, PROGRESS_PERCENT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, OWNER_USER_ID ) VALUES( #{id}, #{projectId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{startDate}, #{dueDate}, 0, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{ownerUserId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TF_TASK SET PROJECT_ID = #{projectId}, PARENT_TASK_ID = #{parentTaskId}, NAME = #{name}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, STATUS = #{status}, PRIORITY = #{priority}, START_DATE = #{startDate}, DUE_DATE = #{dueDate}, PROGRESS_PERCENT = #{progressPercent}, CREATED_AT = #{createdAt}, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt} WHERE ID = #{id}
